originContent: godot-version-manager
translatedContent: godot-version-manager

originContent: Download, install and manage any version of Godot Engine from a simple app.
translatedContent: Download, install and manage any version of Godot Engine from a simple app.

originContent: ## Installation
translatedContent: ## Installation

originContent: ### Windows:
translatedContent: ### Windows:

originContent: Unzip and double-click. (On Windows XP please make sure Powershell is installed)
translatedContent: Unzip and double-click. (On Windows XP please make sure Powershell is installed)

originContent: ### Linux:
translatedContent: ### Linux:

originContent: Unzip and double-click. Extraction of downloaded versions requires `unzip` which, if not installed, should be available in your distro repository
translatedContent: Unzip and double-click. Extraction of downloaded versions requires `unzip` which, if not installed, should be available in your distro repository

originContent: ### OSX:
translatedContent: ### OSX:

originContent: - Should auto extract after download
translatedContent: - Should auto extract after download

originContent: - You need to run `sudo xattr -r -d com.apple.quarantine path/to/Godot Version Manager.app` since unsigned binaries get marked as untrusted otherwise. Feel free to build the project yourself if you don't trust the prebuilt binaries
translatedContent: - You need to run `sudo xattr -r -d com.apple.quarantine path/to/Godot Version Manager.app` since unsigned binaries get marked as untrusted otherwise. Feel free to build the project yourself if you don't trust the prebuilt binaries

originContent: - Double click Godot Version Manager.app
translatedContent: - Double click Godot Version Manager.app

originContent: ## Features
translatedContent: ## Features

originContent: - Automatically download and install any version of Godot from a drop-drown menu. (requires powershell for extraction)
translatedContent: - Automatically download and install any version of Godot from a drop-drown menu. (requires powershell for extraction)

originContent: - Show or hide alpha, beta, rc and dev versions from download drop-down.
translatedContent: - Show or hide alpha, beta, rc and dev versions from download drop-down.

originContent: - Add your own binaries anywhere on your filesystem.
translatedContent: - Add your own binaries anywhere on your filesystem.

originContent: - Colorful icons to easily distinguish stable, rc, beta, alpha and master builds.
translatedContent: - Colorful icons to easily distinguish stable, rc, beta, alpha and master builds.

originContent: - Right click to remove any entry from the list
translatedContent: - Right click to remove any entry from the list

originContent: - Drag and drop to reorder enties
translatedContent: - Drag and drop to reorder enties

originContent: - Drag and drop a project.godot file or Godot project folder to add a project and launch it with a specific version
translatedContent: - Drag and drop a project.godot file or Godot project folder to add a project and launch it with a specific version

originContent: - News feed from godotengine.org./news
translatedContent: - News feed from godotengine.org./news

originContent: ## F.A.Q
translatedContent: ## F.A.Q

originContent: **Q: Where are the downloaded binaries saved to?**
translatedContent: **Q: Where are the downloaded binaries saved to?**

originContent: A: They are saved to `user://versions` which varies depending on your platform. On windows it's %appdata%/Godot/app_userdata/Godot Version Manager/versions
translatedContent: A: They are saved to `user://versions` which varies depending on your platform. On windows it's %appdata%/Godot/app_userdata/Godot Version Manager/versions

originContent: **Q: How is this different from Hourglass or Godot Manager?**
translatedContent: **Q: How is this different from Hourglass or Godot Manager?**

originContent: A:
translatedContent: A:

originContent: - [Hourglass](https://hourglass.jwestman.net/) is a much more mature and featureful project with better support for project management. Maybe the only advantage GVM has is that it also downloads news snippets from the official website :)
translatedContent: - [Hourglass](https://hourglass.jwestman.net/) is a much more mature and featureful project with better support for project management. Maybe the only advantage GVM has is that it also downloads news snippets from the official website :)

originContent: - [Godot Manager](https://github.com/eumario/godot-manager) seems to be a pretty mature and featureful alternative too.
translatedContent: - [Godot Manager](https://github.com/eumario/godot-manager) seems to be a pretty mature and featureful alternative too.

originContent: - [Godots](https://github.com/MakovWait/godots) is a new (Aug 2023) alternative that a lot of people seem to like.
translatedContent: - [Godots](https://github.com/MakovWait/godots) is a new (Aug 2023) alternative that a lot of people seem to like.

originContent: - [GodotEnv](https://github.com/chickensoft-games/GodotEnv) and [godot-version-manager](https://github.com/gaheldev/godot-version-manager) are CLI-only alternatives.
translatedContent: - [GodotEnv](https://github.com/chickensoft-games/GodotEnv) and [godot-version-manager](https://github.com/gaheldev/godot-version-manager) are CLI-only alternatives.

originContent: - [Godot Launcher](https://github.com/sebastianoboem/godot-launcher) is a python-based alternative with support for extension and cache management.
translatedContent: - [Godot Launcher](https://github.com/sebastianoboem/godot-launcher) is a python-based alternative with support for extension and cache management.

originContent: - [gdvm](https://github.com/adalinesimonian/gdvm) is another CLI based version manager built with Rust.
translatedContent: - [gdvm](https://github.com/adalinesimonian/gdvm) is another CLI based version manager built with Rust.
